name: Thai Fish Curry Vmxv03a
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Fresh lemongrass (from the bottom of a 6-inch stalk)
3/4 lb (1 1/2 inches) Thick sea bass Fillets, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the first eight ingredients in a processor until they form a dry paste, stopping frequently to scrape down the sides of the work bowl.
- The paste can be prepared up to 3 days ahead and stored covered in the refrigerator.
2. Heat oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add 2 rounded tablespoons of the spice paste; stir for 1 minute.
4. Add fish and cook for 2 minutes, turning occasionally with tongs.
5. Add coconut milk and clam juice and simmer until the fish is cooked through, turning occasionally, about 6 minutes.
6. Transfer the fish to a plate.
7. Reduce the liquid mixture to a thick sauce over high heat, about 8 minutes.
8. Season with salt.
9. Return the fish to the sauce and heat through.
10. Sprinkle with freshly minced fresh cilantro.
11. Serve over rice.
